---- MODULE PrimaryBackup ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N >= 1

VARIABLES primary, backups, state, lastAcked

vars == <<primary, backups, state, lastAcked>>

Init ==
    /\ primary = 0
    /\ backups = <<>>  \* Sequence of backup IDs
    /\ state = <<>>     \* Sequence of operations
    /\ lastAcked = 0

Next ==
    \/ \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary = 0
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat : \E op \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = Append(state, op)
        /\ backups' = backups
        /\ lastAcked' = lastAcked
    \/ \E b \in Nat :
        /\ primary > 0
        /\ b \in backups
        /\ state' = state
        /\ backups'

    /\ amount' = 0

---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

RequestPage(c) == /\ free /= {}
                  /\ c \in Clients
                     /\ ~(c \in DOMAIN allocated)
                  /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

ReleasePage(c, p) == /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
                     /\ p \in allocated[c]
                  /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<free>>

Next == \E c \in Clients :

---- MODULE SimpleAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init ==
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c) ==
  /\ free /= {}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}]
     /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Release(c) ==
  /\ allocated[c] /= {}
  /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
     /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Next == \E c \in Clients : Request(c) \/ Release(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages

=
